DT.AUM-5-1.ROOT.text: Does the authentication mechanism required by AUM-1-1 or AUM-1-2 use factory default passwords?

DT.AUM-5-1.DN-1.text: Is the user required to change the password before or at first use?

DT.AUM-5-1.DN-2.text: Is the password unique to each individual device?

DT.AUM-5-1.DN-3.text: Does the password meet best practice strength requirements (minimum length, complexity)?

DT.AUM-5-1.PASS-1.text: The device enforces a password change at first use.

DT.AUM-5-1.PASS-2.text: The password is unique per device and meets strength criteria.

DT.AUM-5-1.FAIL-1.text: The password is not unique per device: risk of unauthorized access.

DT.AUM-5-1.FAIL-2.text: The password does not meet the strength criteria required by the standard.

DT.AUM-5-1.NA.text: Requirement AUM-5-1 is not applicable to this asset.
